scripts.install:all: concurrently "cd services && npm install" "cd admin-ui && npm install" "cd customer-ui && npm install"
scripts.run:all: concurrently "cd services && npm start" "cd admin-ui && npm run dev" "cd customer-ui && npm run dev"
scripts.clean:all: concurrently "cd services && rm -rf node_modules && rm -rf package-lock.json" "cd admin-ui && rm -rf node_modules && rm -rf package-lock.json" "cd customer-ui && rm -rf node_modules && rm -rf package-lock.json"
